seed_instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions.
org_constraint: The email should include a bulleted list.
new_constraint: Refrain from including bulleted lists in the email.
instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions. The email should include a bulleted list. Refrain from including bulleted lists in the email.
response:
Subject: Inquiry regarding upcoming exhibitions - [Your Name]

Dear [Gallery Name/Contact Person Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

I am a frequent admirer of the work showcased at [Gallery Name] and have always appreciated your curated selection of contemporary art. I am writing to inquire about your upcoming exhibition schedule for the next few months.

Specifically, I would love to know more about:

The dates for your next solo and group shows.
The themes or specific artists you will be featuring in the coming season.
Whether there will be any opening receptions or artist talks that the public can attend.
Any opportunities for private viewings or educational tours.

Thank you very much for your time and for your continued contribution to the local arts community. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your Website/Social Media Handle, optional]<turn|>
